question: Where does “On Outsourcing Human Resource Management” support or contradict the causal account advanced by “AN EXPLORATORY ASSESSMENT OF THE LINKAGES BETWEEN HRM PRACTICES, ABSORPTIVE CAPACITY, AND INNOVATION IN OUTSOURCING RELATIONSHIPS”?

evidence_spans.text: From the traditional personnel management to a modern human resources management,higher demands are set to the efficiency of human resources management in the enterprises in China.In this situation,outsourcing human resource management functions is a choice of some enterprises in their professional management.In outsourcing,the plight facing enterprises and outsourcing strategy based on the actual conditions of the enterprises become the issue both in theory and practice.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Outsourcing, Business through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 65 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
